layout.footerDescription: Curated AI tools and industry news in one place.

home.subtitle: Browse popular products and links, plus timely news and perspectives. A clean layout that reads well on phones and desktops.
home.featuredToolsHint: Editor’s picks—open a card for details and the official site.
home.latestNewsHint: Updated by date—tap a title to read the full post.
home.openclawSectionHint: AgentSkills-compatible packs: official skills plus custom examples, with GitHub and docs links.
home.scenarioClustersHint: Topic hubs with internal links into tool detail pages—useful for long-tail discovery.
home.categoryHubHint: Editorial hubs with FAQ-style sections, full tool rosters, and links to every official site.

clusterPage.title: Scenario clusters
clusterPage.subtitle: Curated tool lists aligned with how people search—open neutral detail pages, then confirm pricing on the official site.
clusterPage.missingToolsHint: The directory may have changed—some linked slugs are no longer present.
clusterPage.emptyTools: No tools resolved for this cluster right now.

navPage.title: AI tool directory
navPage.subtitle: Browse by category or search. Detail pages include a short description and a link to the official site.
navPage.empty: No results match your filters—try another category or keyword.

toolPage.useCasesBody: The summary should help you decide if this tool fits your needs. When many options look similar, consider how often you’ll use it, budget, and data privacy before choosing one.

categoryPage.toolsHint: Summaries and official links live on each tool page—browse related picks in-category.
categoryPage.empty: No tools listed in this category yet.

newsPage.title: News
newsPage.subtitle: Industry updates, product releases, and short notes—sorted by time.

seo.siteDescription: AI tools directory with 15+ category hubs, deep tool pages (FAQs + checklists), and an OpenClaw / AgentSkills catalog—dense internal linking for discovery.
seo.homeTitle: AI tools directory — category hubs, deep pages & OpenClaw skills
seo.homeDescription: Category landing pages plus 100+ tool pages with suitability notes, checklists, and FAQ structured data. Explore scenario clusters, news, and AgentSkills—all with official links.
seo.navTitle: AI tools — curated directory & category hubs
seo.navDescription: Category landing pages plus search; each tool page links to related picks, breadcrumbs, and the official site for pricing and policies.
seo.newsDescription: Practical AI articles: model choices, privacy habits, multimodal workflows, and agent skills—readable summaries with full posts.
seo.openclawDescription: Explore OpenClaw skills from the official GitHub repo plus common custom examples—CLI/API integrations, SKILL.md, ClawHub, and documentation links.
seo.ogHomeTitle: Plunget — Curated AI category hubs & tool guides
